query:
SELECT 
  pv.variantCode,
  pv.sellingPriceRMB,
  pv.sellingPriceFOB,
  pv.costPriceRMB,
  pv.isDefault
FROM product_variants pv
JOIN products p ON pv.productId = p.id
WHERE p.sku = 'DC-005-OAK'
ORDER BY pv.isDefault DESC, pv.variantCode;
